data.body: There is currently NO test that asserts the watchdog timer emits any log or lifecycle event when it fires. A prior commit (556916f2 on branch cd5e-watchdog-logging) added this logging but never merged to main — and no test caught the regression. Add a vitest spec that: (a) configures a SessionRuntime with watchdogTimeoutMs=50 and a spy onLifecycleEvent; (b) wires a mock child with stdout; (c) does NOT emit any normalized events; (d) advances vi.useFakeTimers() past 50ms; (e) asserts onLifecycleEvent received a 'watchdog_fired' event AND console.warn was called with the [watchdog] tag. This test is the guard — if a future refactor drops the logging, this test must fail.
data.title: Lock watchdog_fired event emission with test
